pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade ModelMapper dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of ModelMapper may fail to compile or run on Java 21 due to internal API changes or bytecode incompatibilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Lombok MapStruct binding dependency to resolve compatibility issues between Lombok and MapStruct in newer Java versions.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this binding, MapStruct and Lombok may conflict during annotation processing, leading to compilation errors or missing getters/setters in generated code.
